reasoning: The question asks for the probability that the temperature on 2026-02-07 will be higher than on 2025-11-09 in Troyes, France. November 9 is historically warmer (mean ~7.8°C) than February 7 (mean ~4.5°C), with a difference in expected value of roughly -3.3°C. Daily mean temperatures in that region during winter have standard deviations around 3.5–4.2°C. Assuming independence, the standard deviation of the difference is approximately 5.46°C. The z-score for a positive difference is 3.3 / 5.46 ≈ 0.60, corresponding to a roughly 27% chance of the February date being warmer than the November date.
